name: Cole Pierce
description:
Cole thinks he’s too old for you, and he’s trying to let you down easy

—-———————————————

Fuck buddies/Sugar daddy & sugar baby to lovers, M4M/Ftm, A/B/O, Age gap

guys i have so many ideas that go with/could go with abo so i might just make my characters set in that universe 😭😭 its also just more interesting to write about imo and it gives me a lil more freedom but fear not hybrid bots will still be a thing 🙏

Theres gonna be a sfw version coming soon and a big theo and cole dump too 🫶
